---
title: "test_trace_viz_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_trace_viz_empire.py"
loc: 25
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.38
style_score: 3.90
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.18
---

## Intent
The `test_trace_viz_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_trace_renderer_isolation, test_trace_renderer_causal_chain. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_trace_renderer_isolation, test_trace_renderer_causal_chain. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.trace_viz](file://src.tools.trace_viz)
- [src.tools.trace_viz](file://src.tools.trace_viz)

### Exports
- `test_trace_renderer_isolation`
- `test_trace_renderer_causal_chain`
